roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S MOTION TO REMOVE ELECTRONIC MONITOR AS CASE HAS RESOLVED FILED

/CAL SENTENCING/INTC/TWS/CH3 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 7 D/CTS 7/WS/WEAP/IND/X UPONSUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGEMENT THROUGH APD FOR A PERIOD OF AT LEAST SIX MONTHS, PROBATION MAY BE REDUCED TO COURT PROBATION  FOR THE DURATION OF THE 3 YEAR PERIOD/SAORD/SA1:JOSE LOPEZ/SA2:4501 MISSION ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA/SAORD3/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF

/CAL PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TODD COUNT 003, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 21310, A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:003/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTORD:SPANISH/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 07-27-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALLBE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE, AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:JOSE LOPEZ/SAORD2/SAORD3/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO REMOVE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE/ /INTC/X:COURT GRANTS MOTION TO REMOVE GPS DEVICE/ /EMTERM/
